SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HIQMET MUCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAYLOR HANSON IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2026 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUCA, HIQMET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HANSON, TAYLOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
